## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and related context.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing
Describe the tests you ran:
- [ ] Tested locally with `python train.py`
- [ ] Tested API with `python api.py`
- [ ] Tested Kubernetes deployment
- [ ] All tests pass

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows style guidelines
- [ ] Code formatted with `black`
- [ ] Code passes linting (`flake8`)
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No new warnings generated
- [ ] PR title is clear and descriptive
- [ ] Changes are focused (no unrelated changes)

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)

## Screenshots (if applicable)
If applicable, add screenshots showing the change.
